title.en: 2023-2024 T2 P3 — BANK_ACCOUNT, COIN, EUR, RON, USD
title.ro: 2023-2024 T2 P3 — BANK_ACCOUNT, COIN, EUR, RON, USD

rubric.en:
**G1** (2p): Organize your project in 10 files: main.cpp, COIN.h, BANK_ACCOUNT.h, BANK_ACCOUNT.h, EUR.cpp, EUR.h, USD.cpp, USD.h, RON.cpp, RON.h
**G2** (3p): The code inside BANK_ACCOUNT.h, EUR.h, RON.h, USD.h, COIN.h includes correct C++ dependencies found in the UML diagram
**G3** (4p): Implementation of the method BANK_ACCOUNT::PrintCoinAmmount method
**G4** (3p): Implementation of the begin(), end() methods in BANK_ACCOUNT
**G6** (3p): Implementation of the method operator+=(string)
**G6** (3p): Implementation of the method operator+=(double)
**G7** (3p): Implementation of the method operator+=(int)
**G8** (2p): Correct implementation of USD class
**G9** (2p): Correct implementation of EUR class
**G10** (2p): Correct implementation of RON class
**G11** (3p): The program compiles and upon execution produces the expected results
rubric.ro:
**G1** (2p): Organizați proiectul în 10 fișiere: main.cpp, COIN.h, BANK_ACCOUNT.h, BANK_ACCOUNT.h, EUR.cpp, EUR.h, USD.cpp, USD.h, RON.cpp, RON.h
**G2** (3p): Codul din BANK_ACCOUNT.h, EUR.h, RON.h, USD.h, COIN.h include dependențe C++ corecte conform diagramei UML
**G3** (4p): Implementarea metodei BANK_ACCOUNT::PrintCoinAmmount
**G4** (3p): Implementarea metodelor begin(), end() în BANK_ACCOUNT
**G6** (3p): Implementarea metodei operator+=(string)
**G6** (3p): Implementarea metodei operator+=(double)
**G7** (3p): Implementarea metodei operator+=(int)
**G8** (2p): Implementarea corectă a clasei USD
**G9** (2p): Implementarea corectă a clasei EUR
**G10** (2p): Implementarea corectă a clasei RON
**G11** (3p): Programul compilează și la execuție produce rezultatele așteptate
